languages.text: Цепной меч покрыт щербинками и засечками — следами многолетней верной службы своему бывшему владельцу.

traits.locale_text: Цепной меч покрыт щербинками и засечками — следами многолетней верной службы своему бывшему владельцу.

languages.text: The chainsword is covered in scrapes and notches, the marks of years of faithful service to its former owner.
languages.original_text: Цепной меч покрыт щербинками и засечками — следами многолетней верной службы своему бывшему владельцу.

languages.text: Esta espada sierra está cubierta de arañazos y muescas, fruto de muchos años al servicio de su anterior propietario.
languages.original_text: The chainsword is covered in scrapes and notches, the marks of years of faithful service to its former owner.

traits.locale_text: Esta espada sierra está cubierta de arañazos y muescas, fruto de muchos años al servicio de su anterior propietario.

languages.text: 这把链锯剑布满划痕与缺口，那是它多年来忠心侍奉前任主人所留下的印记。
languages.original_text: The chainsword is covered in scrapes and notches, the marks of years of faithful service to its former owner.

traits.locale_text: 这把链锯剑布满划痕与缺口，那是它多年来忠心侍奉前任主人所留下的印记。

languages.text: L'épée tronçonneuse est couverte d'entailles et autres éraflures, autant de marques attestant de ses longues années de bons et loyaux services aux mains de son précédent propriétaire.
languages.original_text: The chainsword is covered in scrapes and notches, the marks of years of faithful service to its former owner.

traits.locale_text: L'épée tronçonneuse est couverte d'entailles et autres éraflures, autant de marques attestant de ses longues années de bons et loyaux services aux mains de son précédent propriétaire.

languages.text: Zincirli kılıç, eski sahibine yıllarca sadık bir şekilde hizmet edişinin izleri olan sıyrıklarla ve çentiklerle kaplı.
languages.original_text: The chainsword is covered in scrapes and notches, the marks of years of faithful service to its former owner.

traits.locale_text: Zincirli kılıç, eski sahibine yıllarca sadık bir şekilde hizmet edişinin izleri olan sıyrıklarla ve çentiklerle kaplı.

languages.text: チェーンソーは、傷や刻み跡で覆われており、かつての所有者への忠実な奉仕の証である。
languages.original_text: The chainsword is covered in scrapes and notches, the marks of years of faithful service to its former owner.

traits.locale_text: チェーンソーは、傷や刻み跡で覆われており、かつての所有者への忠実な奉仕の証である。

languages.text: Das Kettenschwert weist zahllose Scharten und Kratzer auf und scheint seinem einstigen Besitzer lange Jahre treu gedient zu haben.
languages.original_text: The chainsword is covered in scrapes and notches, the marks of years of faithful service to its former owner.
